name: UMAP Embedding

min_dist.guidance: Controls how tightly UMAP packs points together. Lower values produce tighter clusters visually. 0.5 is default; 0.1-0.3 often produces more visually distinct clusters.

spread.guidance: Scale of the embedding. Usually left at 1.0.

n_components.guidance: Number of UMAP dimensions. Always 2 for visualization.

validation.check: No NaN values in UMAP embedding.

notes: UMAP is for VISUALIZATION ONLY. Never cluster on UMAP coordinates. Never interpret distances between clusters as biologically meaningful. The topology is informative but metric distances are not preserved.
